definitions: A young man in the 1950s and early 1960s, especially in the US, who belonged to a subculture typified by a rebellious attitude, slicked-back hair, and often leather jackets.
A member of a street gang, especially in the mid-20th century.
examples: The Greasers often hung out at the local diner.
Their style was distinct, with leather jackets and slicked-back hair.
The movie depicted the rivalry between the Greasers and the Socs.
